headline: Asian Geography
description: Asia (44.6 million km²) is the largest continent — 30% of Earth's land. 48 countries, ~4.7 billion people (60% of humanity). Features: Himalayas (highest range), Gobi Desert, Yangtze River (longest in Asia, 6,300 km), Siberian taiga (largest forest), Dead Sea (lowest point on land, -430m). Monsoons define seasonal climate for billions.

citation.name: National Geographic Atlas of the World, 11th Ed
